---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to add.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed implementation or idea.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

## 📌 Additional Context

Add any additional information, mockups, or references related to the feature.
